goal: Rerun the interrupted post-HQ-082 fleet validation once and reconcile status only.
acceptance: Run the fleet test command exactly once.
If validation passes, record the rerun evidence and leave HQ-085 as the next recommended task.
If validation fails or is interrupted, record one concise fingerprint and stop without fixes.
stopIf: Any failure requires edits outside allowedFiles.

The task expands into fixes, feature work, package creation, product repos, all-fleet execution, staging, commit, push, deploy, install, migration, secrets/auth/payments/deploy material, lock deletion, or permission widening.
A second task would be started in the same run.

evidenceDigest.nonAuthorityNotice: This thin task packet is evidence and bounded task shape only; it does not approve execution beyond the listed validation-only task.
expectedEvidence: No implementation, package creation, product repo access, staging, commit, push, deploy, install, migration, lock deletion, or permission widening
